title: [cross-impl] inconsistent TrickleTimer half/offset calc across Rust, Python, Zephyr C
description: Rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs:112 uses half = interval/2; offset = rand_offset % half. Python/python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:69 uses half=(interval+1)//2; range=interval-half. C/lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c still contains unresolved merge conflict markers (HEAD vs origin/worktree-worker23 variants of half/range calc from deb58e88b merge). Leads to different transmit_time for odd intervals (e.g. interval=5). Tests use even values so undetected. Violates constants.toml canonical params and "same algorithm" rule. See lichen/tests/trickle/main.c and rust tests.
close_reason: Fixed cross-impl Trickle half/offset calculation consistency; cleaned references to prior variants and unnecessary comments; tests now align on bias-free formula for odd intervals
